atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a headache.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carolyn reports a headache that started approximately one week ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carolyn reports a dull pain in the back of her head.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carolyn reports flushing in her ears.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carolyn reports occasional dizziness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has taken Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has taken Advil.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the headaches persist despite medication.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the headache is worse in the evening.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the onset to increased stress levels.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a history of trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has had headaches before.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this headache is not the worst she's experienced.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports posterior mild paraspinal muscular tenderness in the cervical spine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals no abnormalities except for some posterior mild paraspinal muscular tenderness in the cervical spine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Extraocular movements are intact.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Funduscopic exam shows no papilledema.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart exam reveals a grade 3/6 systolic ejection murmur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vital signs are within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is working on the computer for approximately 8 hours per day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with a tension-type headache.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are likely exacerbated by stress and musculoskeletal tension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of diabetes mellitus type two.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes flexeril 5 mg three times daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician continues metformin 500 mg twice daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an A1c

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a CBC

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a chem-12

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends she check her blood sugars daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in one month

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends she return in one month, or sooner if the headaches worsen or become more severe

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends getting her back into an exercise routine to help manage her blood sugars
